name: pyelftools (Pure Python ELF File Parser)

performance.notes: Pure Python; slower than readelf for large binaries but scriptable

agent_readiness.notes: Pure Python ELF file parser (Linux/Unix binaries). from elftools.elf.elffile import ELFFile. with open('binary', 'rb') as f: elf = ELFFile(f). elf.num_sections(). section = elf.get_section_by_name('.text'). section.data(). Dwarf debug info parsing. Symbol tables. Dynamic section. Program headers. Used by compilers, linkers, security tools. No system libelf dependency. readelf replacement in Python. Pwntools uses pyelftools internally.

gotchas: ELF only — no PE or Mach-O (use LIEF for cross-format)
Pure Python — slower than readelf for very large binaries
Documentation sparse — best to read source or examples
DWARF info parsing can be complex
best_when: Parsing Linux ELF binaries for security research automation
Symbol table analysis in CTF or malware research
When readelf output needs programmatic parsing
avoid_when: Windows PE or macOS Mach-O binaries
summary: pyelftools parses Linux ELF binaries in pure Python. ELFFile(f).get_section_by_name('.text').data() — programmatic access to sections, symbols, dynamic entries, DWARF debug info. No libelf dependency. Used internally by pwntools. ELF-only (no PE/Mach-O) — use LIEF for cross-format. Best for automating ELF binary analysis and DWARF parsing in security research.
